name: Form: Add Field

description.en: Add an input field to an existing form.
description.de: Ein Eingabefeld zu einem bestehenden Formular hinzufügen.
description.es: Add an input field to an existing form.
description.fr: Add an input field to an existing form.
description.ro: Add an input field to an existing form.
description.it: Add an input field to an existing form.

bot: Call form-get first to read the current definition. Then use this warp to add a new field.

actions.prompt: Append a new field to actions[0].inputs of the current definition. Derive the `as` key in camelCase from the field name. Write a concise description in English and German. Preserve everything else in the definition exactly.

description.en: Label shown to the user (e.g. Email Address)
description.es: Label shown to the user (e.g. Email Address)
description.fr: Label shown to the user (e.g. Email Address)
description.ro: Label shown to the user (e.g. Email Address)
description.it: Label shown to the user (e.g. Email Address)

description.en: Input type: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date, or checkbox
description.de: Eingabetyp: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date oder checkbox
description.es: Input type: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date, or checkbox
description.fr: Input type: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date, or checkbox
description.ro: Input type: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date, or checkbox
description.it: Input type: string, email, phone, number, textarea, date, or checkbox

description.en: Is this field required? (true or false)
description.de: Ist dieses Feld ein Pflichtfeld? (true oder false)
description.es: Is this field required? (true or false)
description.fr: Is this field required? (true or false)
description.ro: Is this field required? (true or false)
description.it: Is this field required? (true or false)

inputs.name: Current Definition
inputs.bot: The full current form definition JSON string. Fetch it from form-get and pass it here verbatim.

inputs.name: Form ID
inputs.bot: The form's hash ID. Carry it from context — never ask the user.
